Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for petitioner Claudia Escalera, the Guardian ad Litem for the minor Pearl Escalera.
Order waiving the appearance of the Guardian ad Litem and the minor at today's hearing was filed on August 5, 2011.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $7,011.65.
Attorney Fees - $1,508.66.
Costs - $977.03.

The net balance of $4,525.96 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 3215 SW Ceadar Hills Blvd., Beaverton, OK 97005. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter continued to October 13, 2001 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report re: Receipt & Acknowledgment of Money Into a Blocked Account.
